data.body:
FINALIZE COMPLETE + COMMITTED (63ba508a). All 5 finalize items done + three-pass adopted (user directive) + non-DSO generalization validated + final gate run. 

Deliverables: criteria_v7.json (registry hardening: checklist[]/applies_at/E5-retune/AGENT-routing) -> criteria_v8.json (three-pass-native: severity_by=pass3, default_posture=advisory, block_threshold, T10/T11/T12 LLM-routed). Harnesses: gate_lib.py (substrate+robust parse), corpus_sample.py, e4_singleturn.py, e4_agentic.py, lever_ab.py, analyze_e4.py, three_pass.py (Pass1 emit_findings / Pass2 verifier / Pass3 deterministic), final_gate_3pass.py. Report: docs/experiments/plan-review-finalize-and-threepass.md. Run data in plan-review-gate/runs/. Epic 5fd2 description updated (three-pass section + verdict model + E4 routing correction); linked 5fd2->9da1 relates_to; finalize comment added. 

THREE-PASS CAPSTONE found a REAL gap on the epic itself (no kill-switch/rollback for the gate) -> filed child task ce75-9119-5361-4fc7 (check-ac pass, clarity 7). 

NEXT (not done this session): file the F1-F12 register as tickets; begin implementation per the 9 children (registry/orchestrator first), sharing the Pass-2/Pass-3 implementation with code-review epic 9da1.
